untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a perceptron machine learning model with dynamically optimized linear weights combining multiple component trading rules. This is a black-box ML algorithm with parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life) marked as AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be expressed as a deterministic rule set using only the allowed indicators and operators. The daily re-optimization and moving window data requirements are incompatible with static rule-based backtesting logic.
translation_notes: This signal describes a machine learning-based trading system rather than a rule-based strategy. The perceptron model, weight optimization, and dynamic parameter tuning cannot be translated into the allowed indicator/operator framework. A generic mean-reversion reversal rule using SMA_50 is provided as a placeholder, but this does not capture the intended ML-driven logic.
